{"cards": [{"name": "Skyward Commander", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Knight", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, other creatures you control with flying get +1/+1 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": ""Rise above the battlefield, and victory shall follow."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}, {"name": "Gravecaller Mystic", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["U", "B"], "color_identity": ["U", "B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill two cards.
When ~ dies, you may return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": "Death is but another library to explore.", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}, {"name": "Bloodpact Marauder", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Whenever you sacrifice a creature, ~ deals 1 damage to each opponent.
{1}, Sacrifice a creature: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "Pain shared is strength gained.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}, {"name": "Primal Bruiser", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R", "G"], "color_identity": ["R", "G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample
Whenever ~ or another creature with power 4 or greater enters under your control, ~ deals 2 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": "Size matters when the ground shakes beneath your feet.", "power": "4", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}, {"name": "Grove Captain", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G", "W"], "color_identity": ["G", "W"], "type_line": "Creature — Elf Soldier", "oracle_text": "Convoke
When ~ enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.
Other creatures you control get +1/+0.", "flavor_text": "Unity in numbers, strength in purpose.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}]}
